name: Reactor Knockoff
description: Reactor Knockoff (cwmonkey HTML5 remake) reactor simulation.

economy.notes: Core idle loop: generate power -> sell for money -> buy upgrades -> increase output

cellScaling.notes: Cells use fixed multiplier arrays, not exponential scaling.

tierScaling.notes: Non-cell parts with levels=5 generate 5 tiers with exponential scaling.

mechanics.reflectorEffect: Adds powerIncrease% to adjacent cell power output
mechanics.thermalReflectorEffect: Also adds heatIncrease% to adjacent cell heat output
mechanics.capacitorFunction: Increases reactor max power. Holds heat. Extreme: heat added = 50% of power sold
mechanics.ventFunction: Lowers own heat by vent amount per tick. Extreme: consumes power = heat removed
mechanics.exchangerFunction: Balances heat between self and adjacent components by percentage
mechanics.inletFunction: Takes heat from adjacent components into reactor hull
mechanics.outletFunction: Takes heat from reactor hull into adjacent components
mechanics.extremeExchangerFunction: Also balances heat across entire row
mechanics.thermionicCoolantFunction: 50% of heat added instantly converted to power
mechanics.chargedPlatingFunction: Increases both max heat AND max power of reactor
mechanics.particleAcceleratorFunction: Generates Exotic Particles based on heat. Explosion = instant meltdown
mechanics.blackHoleAcceleratorFunction: Actively draws heat from reactor at cost of 1 power per 1 heat
mechanics.forcefulFusion: Cells produce 1% more power at 1k heat, 2% at 2m heat, etc. per level
mechanics.offlineProgression: Processes ticks while game is closed
